case_title: ALLAN CHI VS. YENN YEN LAI

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHI, ALLAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,200.00 FILED BY CHI, ALLAN AS TO DEFENDANT LAI, YENN YEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PARTIES SETTLED AT THE PRIOR HEARING AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-03-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ALLAN CHI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YENN YEN LAI IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER CARMEN LI#100365. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES AT THE OCTOBER HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
